data.title: Gate Research: Primary market financing surged 104.8% in October, with capital heavily invested in prediction markets and stablecoin infrastructure.
data.description: According to the "October 2025 Web3 Funding Panorama" report released by Gate Research Institute, the Web3 funding market rebounded strongly in October, with 130 transactions completed and a total funding amount of $5.12 billion, a significant increase of 104.8% month-on-month, marking the second highest level in nearly a year. Strategic rounds dominated the funding structure in October, accounting for over 70%, driven by the explosion of prediction markets and the accelerated integration of CeFi and TradFi. Polymarket topped the list with $2 billion in strategic funding, marking a high point for the prediction market sector in terms of capital investment. CeFi maintained its expansion momentum through mergers and acquisitions and structured financing, continuously deepening its synergy with the traditional financial system. In terms of sectors, DeFi jumped to the top with $2.15 billion in total funding, reflecting the concentrated allocation of capital to innovative financial applications. Stablecoin infrastructure also became a focus, with Tempo completing a $500 million Series A funding round, further consolidating its strategic position as the underlying layer of Web3 finance. The distribution of financing amounts exhibits a pattern of "mid-sized projects dominating, with increasing polarization." Projects with financing amounts in the $3 million–$10 million range are the most active, accounting for over one-third; while smaller financings below $1 million account for only 5.9%, a recent low, indicating that capital is becoming increasingly selective in its screening of "purely conceptual" projects, with funds rapidly flowing towards mature teams and implemented solutions possessing long-term competitiveness. Overall, the Web3 financing landscape in October shows a triple trend of "capital return, structural reshaping, and confidence recovery," suggesting the industry is entering a new cycle driven by steady growth and real value creation.

data.title: Hakimi's market capitalization briefly surpassed $44 million, surging over 40% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of BSC Meme token Hakimi briefly exceeded $44 million, but has since fallen back to $36.87 million, representing a daily increase of over 40%. data.title: Czech National Bank buys USD 1 million in Bitcoin & crypto assets
data.description:
The Czech central bank is testing USD 1 million in Bitcoin and digital assets to evaluate custody, risks, and practical applicability. The article Czech National Bank buys USD 1 million in Bitcoin & crypto assets was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/czech-national-bank-buys-usd-1-million-in-bitcoin-crypto-assets/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Czech+National+Bank+buys+USD+1+million+in+Bitcoin+%26%23038%3B+crypto+assets

data.title: Belarus’ Lukashenko presents crypto as alternative to US dollar
data.description:
The Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko has classified cryptocurrencies as one of the possible paths for the world to wean itself off dependence on the US dollar. The president’s remarks came while he was at a government meeting held to discuss the performance of the Belarusian Nuclear Power Plant, rising electricity consumption and proposals for new […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/belarus-lukashenko-crypto-alternative-dollar/

data.title: Santiment Report Suggests Unlikely Bottom for Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: According to PANews, Santiment, a platform specializing in cryptocurrency sentiment analysis, released a report on Saturday indicating that the likelihood of the cryptocurrency market reaching its bottom is low, despite predictions from numerous analysts and traders. The report advises caution when there is widespread consensus on a specific price bottom, noting that true market bottoms often form when the majority expect prices to continue declining.

data.title: Hourglass: Stable pre-deposit phase two concludes, with over 10,000 verified wallets contributing over $1.1 billion in eligible deposits.
data.description: Hourglass announced on its X platform that the second phase of its Stable pre-deposit program has concluded, with over 10,000 verified wallets contributing more than $1.1 billion in eligible deposits. Phase two employed a pro-rata allocation mechanism, distributing funds based on all eligible deposits and providing a minimum guaranteed allocation of $1,000 to prevent dilution by larger depositors for smaller participants—the first $1,000 of each eligible deposit was allocated pro-rata, with any amount exceeding $1,000 allocated proportionally. Hourglass added that the allocated funds are expected to be returned around the end of the year and are currently being transferred to the Anchorage custody platform, with $500 million to be allocated through top investment banks. More announcements will follow.

data.title: The total open interest of ETH futures contracts decreased by 4.15% in the past 24 hours.

The top three open interest providers are Binance, CME, and Gate, with Binance holding $7.44 billion, CME holding $6.86 billion, and Gate holding $3.45 billion.

data.title: Solana Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow on November 14
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that on November 14, Eastern Time, the U.S. Solana spot ETF experienced a total net inflow of $12.04 million. The Bitwise Solana spot ETF (BSOL) recorded a single-day net inflow of $12.04 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $358 million. Meanwhile, the Grayscale Solana spot ETF (GSOL) reported no net inflow, maintaining its historical total net inflow at $24.32 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $541 million, with a Solana net asset ratio of 0.64%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $382 million.

data.title: A whale sold off 5,772 ETH during a certain trading session, incurring a loss of $7.74 million. After holding the position for two months, its assets shrank by 29.7%.
data.description: On-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring indicates that the swing trading whale 0x22a...6a2A0 appears to have liquidated 5772 ETH (US$18.43 million) accumulated between September 9th and October 9th. Selling this would result in a loss of US$7.74 million, representing a 29.7% decrease in assets over the past two months. Of this, 5728.07 ETH were purchased on-chain at an average price of US$4539.04 at the peak of the cryptocurrency price, representing a total investment of US$26 million. However, its WBTC has not yet been sold.

data.title: The first US XRP spot ETF was launched, with no net inflows on the first day, but a net inflow of $243 million on the second day.
data.description: On November 13th, the first US-listed spot ETF for the single token XRP—the Canary XRP ETF (ticker symbol XRPC)—officially listed on Nasdaq. The Canary XRP ETF supports both cash and in-kind subscriptions and redemptions, with a management fee of 0.50%. According to SoSoValue data, XRPC saw no net inflows on its first day of trading, with a trading volume of $59.22 million; on the second day, it saw a net inflow of $243 million through cash or in-kind subscriptions, with a trading volume of $26.72 million. As of press time, the Canary XRP ETF has total net assets of $248 million, with an XRP net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total XRP market capitalization) of 0.18%.

data.title: Avenir Group's Bitcoin ETF Holdings Increase in Third Quarter
data.description: According to Odaily, SEC filings reveal that Avenir Group, the family office of Li Lin, disclosed its Bitcoin ETF holdings for the third quarter. As of September 30, 2025, the group holds 18,297,107 shares of BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), with a market value of $1.189 billion. This represents an approximate 18% increase from the second quarter, marking the fifth consecutive quarter as the largest institutional holder in Asia.

data.title: As of Q3, Avenir Group, owned by Lee Lin's family, held IBIT worth $1.189 billion.
data.description: SEC filings show that Avenir Group, the Li Lin family office, disclosed its Bitcoin ETF holdings for the third quarter. As of September 30, 2025, it held 18,297,107 shares of BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), with a market value of $1.189 billion, an increase of approximately 18% from the second quarter, making it the largest institutional holder in Asia for the fifth consecutive quarter.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Extends CEO's Term to 2026
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has announced the reappointment of CEO Leung Fung-yee for another two-year term, effective January 1, 2026. During her new term, Leung will continue to focus on regulatory reforms, market development, and seamless leadership transitions to ensure the SFC's long-term effective operation.

Leung was initially appointed as CEO on January 1, 2023, with her current term set to expire on December 31, 2025.
